etymology.description: semantic 亻(人) (rén, "person") + phonetic 乍(乍) (zhà) -> make; create; do; work
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 亻(人) (rén, "person") indicating human involvement or action with 乍(乍) (zhà) for its phonetic sound. This results in the meaning of acting or creating, as it involves a person performing an action or task.

examples.chinese: 他每天都要工作(他每天都要工作)。
examples.english: He has to work every day.

examples.chinese: 我正在创作一首新歌(我正在創作一首新歌)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ zhèngzài chuàngzuò yī shǒu xīn gē.
examples.english: I am composing a new song.

examples.chinese: 他们共同制作了这部电影(他們共同製作了這部電影)。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen gòngtóng zhìzuò le zhè bù diànyǐng.
